package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for bun_select_scan_without_limit: Bun select-and-scan request paths without a visible limit or pagination marker.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: info.
type Rule248NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario248Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule248NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
